name: VFMVN30 ETF Fund
summary: VFMVN30 ETF Fund is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Viet Fund Management Company. It invests in the public equity markets of Vietnam. The fund seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It invests in the stocks of large-cap companies. The fund seeks to replicate the performance of the VN30 Index, by investing in the stocks of companies as per their weightings in the index. VFMVN30 ETF Fund was formed on July 4, 2014 and is domiciled in Vietnam.
